legal_notice: This report is a technical rights-review surface, not legal advice and not a final legal determination.
rights_language: rights-reviewed public-domain candidate under Turkish death+70 rule

rule_summary.law: Law No. 5846 on Intellectual and Artistic Works
rule_summary.term_interpretation: Author lifetime plus 70 years, with death-based terms calculated from the first day of the year after the author's death.

sources.author_reference: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Culture and Tourism author page: https://www.ktb.gov.tr/EN-119659/sabahattin-ali.html
sources.source_text_status: rights-reviewed public-domain candidate under Turkish death+70 rule
sources.copyright_rule_applied: Türkiye Law No. 5846, Articles 26-27: author lifetime plus 70 years, counted from the first day of the year after death
sources.notes: Only the base literary work is in scope. Modern publisher introductions, editor notes, simplified/modernized rewrites, cover matter, footnotes, afterwords, and special edition material are excluded.
